zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose於1182年9月19日出生在英國素可布拉波時，他的父親William de Braose28歲，母親Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber26歲。他於1205年之前與Grace de Briwere在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1228年6月16日在英國威爾斯波斯布雷孔享年45歲，埋葬在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose于1182年9月19日出生在英国素可布拉波时，他的父亲William de Braose28岁，母亲Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber26岁。他于1205年之前与Grace de Briwere在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1228年6月16日在英国威尔斯波斯布雷孔享年45岁，埋葬在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose was born on 19 September 1182, in Bramber, Sussex, England, his father, William de Braose, was 28 and his mother, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, was 26. He married Grace de Briwere before 1205, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 June 1228, in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales.

fr.Brecon, Powys, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose est né le 19 septembre 1182, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Braose, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Grace de Briwere avant 1205, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 juin 1228, à Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose am 19. September 1182 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Braose 28 und seine Mutter Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber 26. Er hat vor 1205 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Grace de Briwere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 16. Juni 1228 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Brecon, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales begraben.

ht.Brecon, Powys, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose è nato il il 19 settembre 1182 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William de Braose, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Grace de Briwere prima del 1205, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 giugno 1228, nel Brecon, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Brecon, Breconshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braoseが1182年9月19日にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは28歳，母Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramberは26歳であった。1205年以前にイギリスイギリススセックスでGrace de Briwereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1228年6月16日にイギリスウェールズポウイスブレコンで45歳で死去し，ウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose(이)가 1182년 9월 19일 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1205년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Grace de Briwere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1228년 6월 16일 영국 웨일스 파우이스 브레콘에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에 묻혔다.

pt.19 September 1182–16 June 1228: 19 de setembro de 1182–16 de junho de 1228
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose nasceu em 19 de setembro de 1182, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Braose, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace de Briwere antes 1205, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1228, em Brecon, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales.

ro.Brecon, Powys, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose родился 19 сентября 1182 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Braose было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace de Briwere перед 1205 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 июня 1228 г. в местности брекон, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс.

es.19 September 1182–16 June 1228: 19 de septiembre de 1182–16 de junio de 1228
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord of Abergavenny Reginald de Braose nació el 19 de septiembre de 1182, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Braose, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Grace de Briwere antes de 1205, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de junio de 1228, en Brecon, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales.
